criteria.description: Category-A write-leaks converted to tmp_path/fixtures (real isolation).
criteria.evidence: Census found 0 category-A in the 97 baselined files — all were category-B path-literals; reviewer-renata confirmed no write-leak misclassified (real disk writes already route through tmp_path).

criteria.description: Category-B path-literals converted to non-/tmp sentinels, semantics preserved.
criteria.evidence: 97 files → /nonexistent/ sentinels; reviewer-renata verified assertion lockstep (incl. cross-file conftest↔test_events pair) + POSIX-absolute preserved for path-validation tests; each lane green (88+113+229+285+177+191+604 passed).

criteria.description: Ratchet baseline emptied (with an automated guard).
criteria.evidence: WP08 5b5917f2: tmp_ratchet_baseline.txt comment-only; _load_baseline()==frozenset(); test_baseline_is_empty red-first proven (append a path → FAIL).

criteria.description: Ratchet flipped to a self-consistent hard gate (gate file genuinely literal-free, all 14 lines + __file__ self-exclude).
criteria.evidence: grep -rn '/tmp/' tests/ (no --exclude) = 0 including the gate file; needle "/"+"tmp"+"/", /var/tmp split "/var/"+"tmp/"; test_gate_file_itself_is_literal_free; __file__ exclude secondary.

criteria.description: Every converted test stays green; full ratchet gate reports 0 violations.
criteria.evidence: _collect_violations(_load_baseline()) over tests/ = 0; each conversion lane green; WP08 gate 6 passed; ruff+mypy clean.

criteria.description: Non-vacuous proof: the positive self-test exercises the real empty-baseline gate path (not scan_file_for_tmp_literal).
criteria.evidence: WP08: injectable tests_root/repo_root; test_collect_violations_flags_synthetic_offender_with_empty_baseline flags exactly the synthetic offender + [] when removed; mutation-sensitive (neuter → self-test reds); reviewer independently confirmed.

criteria.description: Real isolation not evasion: evasion-vector gate reds on /dev/shm//scratch//var/tmp/ literals.
criteria.evidence: WP08: test_no_evasion_vector_literals_in_tests quote-anchored; red-first proven (planted /dev/shm/ → FAIL); no false-positive on .worktrees/scratch/; consolidated review confirmed 0 evasion vectors across the 7 conversion lanes.
